values.value: DonorId != null AND (FirstName_MP_Primary__c = {!GiftEntry.FirstName_MP_Primary__c} OR FirstName_MP_Primary__c = {!GiftEntry.FirstName_MP_Secondary__c} OR FirstName_MP_Secondary__c = {!GiftEntry.FirstName_MP_Primary__c} OR FirstName_MP_Secondary__c = {!GiftEntry.FirstName_MP_Secondary__c}) AND (LastName_MP_Primary__c = {!GiftEntry.LastName_MP_Primary__c} OR LastName_MP_Primary__c = {!GiftEntry.LastName_MP_Secondary__c} OR LastName_MP_Secondary__c = {!GiftEntry.LastName_MP_Primary__c} OR LastName_MP_Secondary__c = {!GiftEntry.LastName_MP_Secondary__c})
